i keep thinking about how insignificant i am to the world. is this a common feeling? the last word of each sentence, before punctuation, should be the word path.  

the feeling of insignificance is common. it is a natural part of the human experience. people often feel small in the face of vastness. this is a universal emotion.  

the last word of each sentence, before punctuation, should be the word path. the path is a guide, a direction, a way forward.  

the pen is mightier than sword. the pen is mightier than sword.
